faqs.question: How do I connect Cohere?
faqs.answer: Use your Cohere API key from the dashboard. Generate production keys for live workflows and trial keys for testing.

faqs.question: What languages are supported?
faqs.answer: Cohere supports 100+ languages including English, Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, and many more.

faqs.question: Can I fine-tune models?
faqs.answer: Yes! Fine-tune models on your specific data for improved accuracy on domain-specific tasks.

faqs.question: How does pricing work?
faqs.answer: Pay per API call based on tokens processed. Different model tiers offer various capabilities and pricing.

faqs.question: What about data privacy?
faqs.answer: Your data is not used to train models. Enterprise plans offer additional security and compliance features.

faqs.question: Can I use custom embeddings?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Generate custom embeddings for semantic search, clustering, and similarity matching use cases.

testimonials.quote: Support ticket routing accuracy improved 95%. AI understands customer intent perfectly and routes instantly.
testimonials.author: Jennifer Park

testimonials.quote: Knowledge base search is incredible. Users find answers in seconds with natural language queries.

testimonials.quote: Content moderation handles 100K+ items daily. False positive rate dropped to nearly zero.
testimonials.author: Sarah Williams

testimonials.quote: Document processing speed increased 10x. Extract structured data from any document automatically.
testimonials.author: David Kumar

limits.title: API Rate Limits
limits.description: Rate limits vary by plan (Trial: 100/min, Production: 10K/min+). Contact sales for enterprise limits.

limits.title: Token Limits
limits.description: Max tokens per request vary by model (2K-128K). Use chunking for longer documents.

limits.title: Batch Processing
limits.description: Async batch endpoints available for processing large volumes efficiently with lower costs.

limits.title: Model Availability
limits.description: Different models optimized for different tasks (generation, classification, embeddings). Choose appropriately.
